en: If your company is required to register with the Trade and Businesses Register (RCS), you will be asked to provide the relevant extract in a subsequent form.\n\n
Extract K or KBIS can be used to prove that a company is registered in the Trade and Businesses Register (RCS). Follow this link for more information about the KBIS Extract.
Is your company required to have a KBIS Extract?
French Service Public – Entreprendre KBIS Extract Information\n
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from needing a KBIS Extract.

The company is a handcrafted or liberal activity company and is registered in the National Register of Companies (RNE) instead of the RCS. The company obtains a proof of registration with the RNE (RNE extract), the functional equivalent to the KBIS.
The company is an individual enterprise or sole proprietorship and receives a K extract instead of a KBIS, which applies only to legal entities.
The company is a non-commercial entity not engaged in commercial activities (e.g., certain agricultural or non-profit entities).
The company does not perform work in France.
The company is registered in a country outside of France.
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing a KBIS Extract.
